chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 197 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on MA No.6644/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For hearing of post-arrest bail 17.11.2025 Mr. Ali Hassan Shar, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2 & 3. Learned Counsel, on instructions, requires the bail application to be disposed of as not pressed. Ordered accordingly. J U D G E Abdul Basit
